evals.prompt: 帮我做一个专门维护 skill 的 skill。要求每次跑之前先检查 skill-creator 有没有更新，如果更新了就同步新的规则，然后再用 opencode 风格去优化目标 skill。
evals.expected_output: Should trigger this skill because the user wants a reusable self-maintenance skill for other skills, with a mandatory skill-creator freshness check and an OpenCode-style optimization workflow.

evals.prompt: 我不想每次手工改 skill 了，给我一个长期可用的 skill-maintainer。它要先对齐最新的 skill-creator，再继续迭代目标 skill 的 description、evals 和结构。
evals.expected_output: Should trigger because this is a reusable skill-maintenance workflow request rather than a one-off skill edit.

evals.prompt: 帮我直接把 blog-to-wechat-pipeline 这个 skill 的 description 改短一点，别新建 workflow skill。
evals.expected_output: Should NOT be the main workflow here; this is a narrower one-off edit request unless the user also asks for a reusable maintenance skill.
